title: Rich German Pork Pancakes
description: Tender and rich German pancakes filled with ground pork and cinnamon, perfect for a Mediterranean-friendly brunch
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, eggs, milk, cinnamon, salt, and pepper to make the pancake batter.
In a separate pan, cook the ground pork over medium heat until browned, breaking it into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the cooked pork to the pancake batter and stir until just combined.
Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat and brush with butter.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter onto the skillet or griddle.
Cook the pancakes for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface and the edges start to dry.
Flip the pancakes and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
Serve the pancakes hot with your choice of toppings, such as maple syrup or fresh fruit.
